name: Sayiir Dev
postCreateCommand: npm install -g pnpm && cargo build && pip install -e sayiir-python/ && cd sayiir-nodejs && pnpm install
postStartCommand:
echo '
🚀 Sayiir dev environment ready!

  Rust:    cd examples/hello-world-rs && cargo run
  Python:  python examples/hello-world-py/main.py
  Node.js: cd examples/hello-world-node && pnpm install && pnpm tsx index.ts
'
